subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still on the sidewalk curb, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing a white short-sleeve t-shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual summer attire with dark jeans and white sneakers; the stop sign graphic is bold and high-contrast, dominating the shirt's front under bright sun.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: White short-sleeve t-shirt with a printed red stop sign, dark blue jeans, white sneakers.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, attentive gaze toward the vehicle.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Medium skin tone with a smooth, evenly lit complexion under bright midday sun.
subjects.facial_features: Short dark hair, dark eyes, clean-shaven, relaxed brow, no distinguishing marks visible at distance.

background_setting: A suburban arterial road under bright clear midday summer skies. The two-lane road has wide dry fresh asphalt with crisp painted lane markings, bordered by concrete sidewalks, occasional parked cars, low retail plazas and gas stations set back behind landscaped verges, leafy street trees, and lamp posts. Distant traffic and a few pedestrians appear faintly in the sunlit background, conveying a typical mid-day suburban environment.

lighting.conditions: Bright clear midday summer sunlight, sun high overhead.
lighting.direction: High overhead sun slightly behind the ego vehicle, front-lighting the pedestrian.
lighting.shadows: Short, hard shadows pooled directly beneath the pedestrian and objects; the pedestrian's front stays fully illuminated.
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, high-clarity illumination with strong color contrast, making the stop sign shirt graphic clearly legible.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective centered on the wide arterial ahead, the pedestrian positioned to the right on the sidewalk; lane markings lead the eye toward the vanishing point.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Neutral grays of fresh asphalt and concrete, deep blue summer sky, lush green foliage, with the red stop sign on the white shirt providing a vivid focal accent.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm, routine, ordinary suburban midday drive.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane dashes, set-back retail signage, and evenly spaced lamp posts.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus across the road scene, with the pedestrian remaining clearly resolved as the car approaches.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario on a bright suburban arterial demonstrating a stationary pedestrian on the curb with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward along its suburban arterial lane in bright midday sun; the pedestrian appears ahead on the right sidewalk, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary on the curb.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed; the pedestrian remains on the curb and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's white t-shirt.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on dry fresh asphalt under bright midday summer sun, approaching the stationary pedestrian on the right curb whose shirt displays a stop sign.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches; vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains on the curb and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and out of frame; vehicle maintains speed and lane position.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a sunlit suburban arterial road with fresh asphalt and set-back retail plazas, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward; a pedestrian stands on the right sidewalk facing the camera, a red stop sign clearly printed on their white shirt. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed, remaining planted on the curb under short hard shadows. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before leaving frame as the road continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient suburban driving sounds dominate: a steady engine hum, tire noise on dry asphalt, faint passing traffic, and distant background murmur. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive.
